===Han character===

# [[buy]], [[redeem]]
# [[ransom]]
# atone for

==Chinese==
{{zh-forms|s=赎|alt=𧹎}}

===Glyph origin===
{{Han etym}}
{{Han compound|貝|𧶠|ls=psc|c1=s|c2=p|t1=shell}}; the phonetic was originally {{zh-l|𧷏}} and has later become graphically similar to the unrelated {{zh-l|*賣}}.

===Etymology===
From {{inh|zh|sit-pro|*b-lu-t-s||to ransom; to buy off}}; compare {{cog|bo|བླུ}} (STEDT; {{zh-ref|Schuessler, 2007}}).
